reasoning: Zohran Mamdani is the Democratic nominee in the 2025 NYC mayoral election and the overwhelming favorite to win first place. Recent polling averages show him holding a roughly 15- to 17-point lead over independent candidate Andrew Cuomo, with Republican Curtis Sliwa further behind at around 15%. Prediction markets up to late October reflect a ~93% probability that Mamdani will win the election outright. If Mamdani wins first place, he will not finish in second place, causing this market to resolve NO. Thus, his chances of finishing exactly in second place correspond to the likelihood of an upset by Cuomo (while remaining ahead of Sliwa), which is approximately equivalent to Mamdani's 7% chance of losing the race.
